# Malaika Nisar — Digital Marketer Portfolio

> Site: https://malaikaanisar.vercel.app
> Author: Malaika Nisar
> Purpose: Personal portfolio and blog website
> Contact: malaikaanisar2521@gmail.com

## About

Malaika Nisar is a results-driven Digital Marketer based in Rahim Yar Khan, Pakistan. She specializes in social media marketing, content strategy, SEO, and data-driven campaigns. She currently manages the digital presence for leading toy brands including Bacha Toys, Junior Land, and Golu Baby.

## Content

This website contains the following sections:

- **Home** (`/`): Introduction, latest blog posts, and resume summary
- **Blogs** (`/blogs`): Articles on digital marketing, social media strategy, content creation, and SEO
- **Work** (`/work`): Professional projects and work experience showcase
- **Tools** (`/tools`): Marketing tools, platforms, and software recommendations
- **Resume** (`/resume`): Professional resume with work experience, skills, and education
- **About** (`/about`): Detailed biography, interests, books, podcasts, and more

## Skills & Expertise

- Social Media Marketing (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok)
- Content Strategy & Creation
- Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
- Google Analytics & Search Console
- Meta Business Suite & Ads Manager
- E-commerce Management (Shopify)
- Email Marketing (Mailchimp)
- Brand Management & Growth
- Paid Advertising Campaigns
- Canva Design

## Work Experience

- Content Manager & Social Media Marketer at Bacha Toys, Junior Land, and Golu Baby
- Social Media Marketer at G-Tech Solutions

## Education

- BS in Computer Science — The Islamia University of Bahawalpur

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js and deployed on Vercel
- Blog content managed via Notion CMS
- Static site generation with incremental static regeneration
- RSS feed available at `/api/rss.xml`
- Sitemap at `/sitemap.xml`

## Social Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/malaikaanisar
- GitHub: https://github.com/malaikaanisar
- Email: malaikaanisar2521@gmail.com
